description:
Updates config without restarting. Attributes and classes can not be deleted unless {{hl|[[Class Inheritance#delete|delete]]}} is used. Changes to the config are applied to all new entities, a mission restart is not necessarily required. Spawning the vehicle again or switching weapons works too. Since {{GVI|arma3|1.70}} CfgAmmo should be mergeable as well.
{{Feature|warning|Merging a config with an [[PreProcessor_Commands#.23include|include]] statement, that points to a non existing file, will crash the game.}}
name: diag_mergeConfigFile

Item.desc: (Optional, default [[false]]) path is relative to the user directory, otherwise it is relative to the mission directory
Item.name: userdir
